config.transit: Just a few minutes' walk from Taborstraße station.

whatsappPrefill: Hello Fische & mehr, I have a question about today's selection.

hero.title:
live fish.
and much more.
hero.subtitle: a small speciality shop in the 2nd district: live fish, freshly slaughtered for you — plus dried fruit, nuts, natural honey, spices and spirits from uzbekistan and the region.

product.title: fresh, alive.
product.body: live fish is rarer in vienna than you'd think. here it waits in the tank until you order — and is slaughtered fresh for you. fish doesn't get fresher. you taste it. you see it.

fish.title: fish
fish.body: live, fresh, carefully chosen. from classic to special.

spec.title: specialties
spec.body: dried fruit, spices and products from Uzbekistan, Tajikistan and the region.

origin.title:
from central asia
to the second district.
origin.body: the specialties are no accident. they come from where we come from — bringing a piece of home to vienna.

kosher.title:
kosher isn't a label.
it's a promise.
kosher.body: our fish is kosher and carefully handled. for our customers that means reliability — without having to ask.

cta.title: come by.
cta.body: questions about today's selection? give us a call or message us on whatsapp. we're happy to help.

hero.title: what's in our counter.
hero.intro: we deliberately don't list prices here — fresh fish is daily produce, and prices follow the market and the season. just ask, in the shop, by phone or on whatsapp.

fish.title: live fish, freshly slaughtered.
fish.body: we carry a carefully chosen selection rather than an endless range. that keeps the quality high and the freshness dependable. which species are in right now depends on the catch and the season.
fish.note: Live in the tank: carp and amur (grass carp), slaughtered fresh for you. Also day-fresh: salmon, trout, sea bass, sea bream, smoked fish, caviar and more. What's in stock depends on season and delivery.

spec.title: treasures from central asia.
spec.body: dried fruit, nuts, spices and selected products from Uzbekistan, Tajikistan and the region. things with origin and story — rarely found in vienna.
spec.note: Dried fruit, nuts, natural honey, spices, pickled vegetables, sweets and spirits from Uzbekistan, Tajikistan and the region.

platter.title: fish platters to pre-order.
platter.body: for shabbat and holidays we put together fish platters. order in good time — best by phone or whatsapp.

cta.title: looking for something specific?
cta.body: give us a call or message us. we'll tell you what's fresh today.

hero.title:
one shop, one origin,
one conviction.

story.title:
a family business
with roots in central asia.
story.body: fische & mehr is a small speciality shop in vienna's 2nd district, run by a family with roots in central asia. with them came the conviction that fish has to be truly fresh — ideally live, straight from the tank. alongside live and day-fresh fish we bring specialities from uzbekistan, tajikistan and the region to vienna: things that taste of home. today all of that lives behind the counter on glockengasse — personally run, with advice like in the old days.

kosher.title: what you can rely on.
kosher.body: our fish is kosher. for us that's not a selling point but a matter of course toward a community that knows exactly what matters.

origin.title: uzbekistan, tajikistan, vienna.
origin.body: the specialties in our shop come from where our roots are. they are a bridge — between two worlds, and between people looking for a piece of home.

v1.title: quality over quantity
v1.body: a few species genuinely fresh, rather than a full shelf from yesterday.

v2.title: personal
v2.body: we know our goods and our customers. this is not a supermarket.

v3.title: dependable
v3.body: kosher, fresh, there when you need us — especially before the holidays.

hours.title: opening hours
hours.note: hours may differ on holidays. when in doubt, give us a quick call.

whatsapp.title: whatsapp
whatsapp.body: the fastest way to reach us is whatsapp — also for questions about today's selection or for pre-orders.

transit.title: getting here
transit.body: Just a few minutes' walk from Taborstraße station. Well connected by public transport; you'll find parking in the surrounding streets.

form.title: write to us.
form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please call us or message us on WhatsApp.

gallery.title:
a look
inside the counter.
gallery.intro: no price list — fish is daily produce. this is an impression of what goes over our counter. ask in the shop, by phone or on whatsapp about today's selection.
gallery.note: Photos from our shop. The daily offer changes — just ask what's fresh today.

categories.title:
fish — and everything
that goes with it.
categories.intro: a fish shop with a soft spot for the imported. alongside fresh fish you'll find selected specialties from Uzbekistan and the region — nothing fancy, just good stuff.

fish.title: live fish
fish.body: live in the tank, freshly slaughtered for you. which species are in depends on the catch and the season.

dried.title: dried fruit
dried.body: apricots, raisins, melon and more — sun-dried, from the region.

nuts.title: nuts
nuts.body: walnuts, almonds, pistachios. to snack, bake or give.

honey.title: natural honey
honey.body: real, unprocessed honey. bold and honest in taste.

spices.title: spices
spices.body: aromatic spices for Central Asian cooking and beyond.

spirits.title: spirits
spirits.body: selected spirits and drinks from the region.

notifier.title:
we'll let you know
when a fresh catch is in.
notifier.body: leave your email — we'll get in touch when new stock comes in or there's something special before the holidays. no spam, unsubscribe any time.
notifier.success: You're in! We'll let you know.
notifier.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
notifier.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

findus.title:
on the corner,
in the second district.
findus.mapAlt: Map: location of Fische & mehr, corner Novaragasse / Glockengasse, 1020 Vienna

items.q: Can I pre-order fish or fish platters?
items.a: Yes. Especially before Shabbat and holidays we put together fish platters to pre-order. Best in the shop or by phone, in good time.
Yes, our fish is kosher. For questions about preparation, just talk to us directly.

items.q: What do you have besides fish?
items.a: Specialties from Uzbekistan, Tajikistan and the region: dried fruit, nuts, natural honey, spices and spirits.
Monday to Friday from 08:30 to 17:30. Closed Saturday and Sunday. Hours may differ on public holidays — when in doubt, give us a quick call.

items.q: How do I get to you?
items.a: Glockengasse 22, 1020 Vienna — just a few minutes' walk from Taborstraße station, well connected by public transport.
There's no online shop at the moment. Come by or call — we're happy to tell you what's fresh today.

c1.title: live & fresh
c1.body: live fish from the tank, freshly slaughtered for you — not sitting in cold storage for days. you taste it and you see it.

c2.title: origin on the shelf
c2.body: dried fruit, nuts, natural honey, spices and more from Uzbekistan and the region — things with a story, rarely found in Vienna.

c3.title: your shop round the corner
c3.body: not a supermarket. we know our goods and our customers — personal, right in the 2nd district.

home.title: Fische & mehr — Live & fresh fish in Vienna 1020
home.description: Live fish, freshly slaughtered for you, in Vienna's 2nd district. Plus kosher specialties from Uzbekistan and Tajikistan. Day-fresh, personal, specialised.

sortiment.title: Range — Fische & mehr
sortiment.description: Live and fresh fish and Central-Asian specialties. Daily produce — ask for today's offer.

ueber.title: About — Fische & mehr
ueber.description: The story behind Fische & mehr: kosher fish, Central Asian origins, a small specialized shop in Vienna.

kontakt.title: Contact — Fische & mehr
kontakt.description: Visit us in Vienna's 2nd district. Opening hours, address, phone and WhatsApp.

impressum.title: Imprint — Fische & mehr
impressum.description: Imprint and disclosure for Fische & mehr, Vienna 1020.

datenschutz.title: Privacy — Fische & mehr
datenschutz.description: Privacy policy of Fische & mehr under GDPR.

platter.title:
build your
fish platter.
platter.intro: for shabbat, holidays or just because. pick what goes on it — we'll get back to you to confirm. no online payment, just a no-obligation pre-order by email.
platter.selectionHint: just tell us what should go on the platter. multiple choice possible.
platter.success: Thank you! Your pre-order arrived — we'll get back to you to confirm.
platter.error: Something went wrong. Please call us or message us on WhatsApp.

todayFresh.label: fresh today
todayFresh.note: Kept up to date by our team.

items.name: M. K.
items.quote: Finally a shop in the 2nd district where the fish is genuinely fresh. You can tell right away.

items.name: R. B.
items.quote: The dried fruit and honey are wonderful — tastes like home.

items.name: S. L.
items.quote: Friendly, personal, dependable before Shabbat. Exactly what you'd want.

liveFish.title:
fresh means it was
still swimming today.
liveFish.body: the heart of our shop is live fish. they wait in the tank until you order — then they're slaughtered, cleaned and filleted fresh for you. fish doesn't get fresher than this. that's how it's done in central asia, and that's how we do it in the middle of the 2nd district.
liveFish.note: which fish are live in the tank right now depends on season and delivery — just ask in the shop or by phone.

species.name: Carp
species.desc: the classic — rich and juicy, traditional for holidays and gefilte fish.

species.name: Amur (grass carp)
species.desc: firm, lean fillet with a mild taste — a central asian favourite.

species.name: Silver carp (tolstolob)
species.desc: large and generous, delicate in flavour — ideal for the whole family.

species.name: Trout
species.desc: tender and fine, quick to prepare — always in demand, popular year-round.

species.name: Catfish (wels)
species.desc: few bones and generous, perfect for frying, grilling and braising.

species.name: Sea bass & sea bream
species.desc: refined and mild — day-fresh, ideal whole from the oven.

portions.title:
this is what
our portions look like.
portions.body: every fish is cut fresh for you — in the size you need.
